text: Requesting prior authorization for a lumbar spine MRI for member NH-482913. Attached: referring physician order, six weeks of documented conservative therapy (PT notes), neurological exam showing radiculopathy.
PA request for Ozempic (semaglutide) 1 mg weekly for member NH-771204 with type 2 diabetes. Attached: physician order and diagnosis confirmation.
PA request for rhinoplasty for member NH-334856 to improve nasal appearance. Attached: surgeon consultation notes and pre-operative photos.
PA request for a home oxygen concentrator (DME) for member NH-905112 with chronic dyspnea. No supporting documentation attached yet.

supplemental: Pulse oximetry reading from home visit (SpO2 94% at rest)
Nurse practitioner progress note describing exertional dyspnea
